title: Python Programming
summary: As far as programming languages go, Python is my mother tongue. So far I have used it to:
capabilities: Build fast services using FastAPI and keep apps organized with Django
Write code that is easy to reuse, keeping logic clean and separated
Connect external services to handle errors and retries gracefully

title: Backend Engineering
summary: If Python is how I speak, then backend design is how I think. I build the hidden parts of an app that make sure everything stays stable. My focus includes:
capabilities: Map out how data moves so other developers find the API easy to use
Check that data is valid and secure before it reaches the database
Create clear documentation so teams can start working with the code immediately

title: Data & Databases
summary: I enjoy the logic of how data fits together. To me, a good database is one that stays organized even as it gets bigger. I have worked to:
capabilities: Plan how tables relate to each other so the system stays fast as it grows
Write SQL that retrieves information efficiently without slowing things down
Turn a product idea into a plan for how to store and search for data

title: Cloud & Infrastructure
summary: I like building systems that just work without needing constant attention. I prefer lightweight setups that stay predictable. I use these skills to:
capabilities: Run services on AWS that scale based on demand to keep costs low
Use GitHub Actions to move code to the cloud automatically
Optimize functions so they start up fast and respond without delay
